steps: Calibrate Cobas for Phosphorus analysis by running a multi-analyte serum calibrator and two control serum.

Sample handling as performed by Cobas Mira Plus a) Pipette 3 µL of sample into cuvette. b) Add 280 µL of Phosphorus Liquid Reagent. c) Mixture is incubated at 37˚C for 10 minutes d) Absorbance is measured at 340nm.
creator: Lili Liang
